headline: Analysts Expect These 5 Stocks To Post Outstanding Earnings Growth
summary: First-quarter earnings season kicks off this week, and profits for the S&P 500 should increase 12.6% despite that investors are dealing with multiple shocks. Here are some S&P 500 companies with notable earnings expectations.
